title: Hadoop MapReduce Library
description:
The 'lib' directory contains Java files crucial for MapReduce functionalities. It includes ValueAggregatorJob.java for aggregations, FileInputFormat.java for input data preparation, ControlledJob.java for job lifecycle management, and InputSampler.java for input data sampling. This directory exemplifies the Library Architecture pattern, providing reusable components for efficient big data processing.

TITLE: ConfigUtil.java - Hadoop MapReduce Configuration Management
DESCRIPTION: ConfigUtil.java manages configuration resources in Hadoop MapReduce. It loads deprecated keys and their replacements, and adds default configuration resources. The core functionality is encapsulated in the `loadResources()` method, ensuring seamless configuration management across the MapReduce framework.
